players.name: Cal Raleigh
players.summary: Hit his 3rd HR of the season but Mariners fell 6-4 to Oakland. ESPN raised early concerns about his plummeting exit velocity (91.3→83.3 mph) and 33.3% K rate through 55 PAs.

players.name: Bryce Harper
players.summary: Harper has been 'absolutely raking' since April 1 — 1.188 OPS in April, 4 HRs, a triple. Phillies lost 5-1 to the Cubs despite his hot hitting.

sources.title: Harper is absolutely raking — Phillies are wasting it

players.name: Luis Arraez
players.summary: Hitting .304 through 15 Giants games with 2 SB and 6 RBI. Giants had an off day April 20 before starting a series vs the Dodgers on April 21.

players.name: Bo Bichette
players.summary: Mets extended their losing streak to 11 games on April 19. Bichette is hitting .217 through 22 games on a struggling team. Off day April 20.

players.name: Francisco Lindor
players.summary: Slow start after February hamate surgery — hitting .200 through 20 games. Mets off April 20 following their 11-game losing streak.

players.name: Pete Crow-Armstrong
players.summary: Cubs won their 6th straight 5-1. PCA bruised his right knee on a slide and is day-to-day; manager Craig Counsell hopes he returns Wednesday.

sources.title: Pete Crow-Armstrong's struggles becoming a problem for Cubs

players.name: Jackson Merrill
players.summary: Won MLB's Play of the Week for his HR-robbing catch during April 14–20. Padres shut out the Tigers 3-0 on April 20 to open a new series.

sources.title: Jackson Merrill wins Play of the Week for HR robbery

players.name: Teoscar Hernández
players.summary: Hitting .306/.327/.531 with 3 HR and 11 RBI through 13 games; missed one Rockies game on rest but played April 20 in Dodgers' 12-3 win.

sources.title: Teoscar Hernandez And Dodgers Play Rockies On April 20

players.name: Devin Williams
players.summary: After five clean appearances to open 2026, had a rough outing amid the Mets' losing streak; ERA now 7.11 with 2 SVs. Mets off April 20.

sources.title: Mets fans learning the Devin Williams reality

players.name: Zack Wheeler
players.summary: On 15-day IL with thoracic outlet syndrome (surgery Sep 2025). Rehab start Apr 19 at Double-A Reading: 4 IP, 6 H, 4 ER, 4 K. Targeting late-April return vs Atlanta.

sources.title: Wheeler injury update after rough rehab outing

players.name: Cole Ragans
players.summary: Career-worst outing Apr 19 vs Yankees: 4.1 IP, 7 ER, career-high 8 BBs in 7-0 loss. Now 0-4, 6.00 ERA. Left thumb contusion (Apr 8 comebacker) was cleared.

sources.title: Cole Ragans reaches new low in loss to Yankees
Ragans thumb injury: expects to make next start

players.name: Chase Burns
players.summary: Emerging as one of 2026's best young starters: 1-1, 2.42 ERA, 22 K through 3 starts. Starts Tuesday Apr 21 vs Rays after Reds won 6-1 Monday.

sources.title: Reds' Chase Burns emerging as dominant pitcher in 2026

players.name: Nathan Eovaldi
players.summary: After rough 0-2 start (11 ER in 8.2 IP), Eovaldi has stabilized — 2-3, 5.06 ERA. Pitched Apr 18 vs Seattle; next start ~Apr 23.

players.name: Emmet Sheehan
players.summary: 2-0, 6.60 ERA through 3 starts; career 4-0 vs Colorado. Started Apr 18 at Coors (Rockies won 4-3). Next start ~Apr 23.

sources.title: Dodgers' Sheehan vies to continue mastery of Rockies

players.name: Reid Detmers
players.summary: Took the loss vs Blue Jays Apr 20, Angels fall 5-2. Had been dominant last Tuesday vs Yankees (7 IP, 1 ER, 9 K). Now 1-2 on the season.

sources.title: Coming off gem, Reid Detmers leads Angels vs. Jays

players.name: Giancarlo Stanton
players.summary: Yankees off April 20; Stanton given rest ahead of Red Sox series. Through 20 games: .240 BA, 2 HR, 10 RBI. Shoulder management ongoing.

sources.title: Giancarlo Stanton update after removal from Yankees lineup

injuries.name: Zack Wheeler
injuries.note: TOS decompression surgery Sep 23 2025. Rehab start Apr 19 at Reading: 4 IP, 6 H, 4 ER, 4 K. Target return: late April vs Atlanta (Apr 24-26).

source.title: Wheeler injury update after rough rehab outing

injuries.name: Pete Crow-Armstrong
injuries.note: Bruised right knee on a slide. Expected to miss Apr 21; manager Craig Counsell hopes he returns Wednesday Apr 22.

source.title: Pete Crow-Armstrong's struggles becoming a problem for Cubs
